name: Moore POLYWOOD Outdoor Patio Chair, Adirondack Chair - Threshold™
description:
With an eye-catching design and comfort that doesn't quit, the Moore Adirondack Chair POLYWOOD from Threshold™ will have family, friends, and neighbors asking, "Where did you get it?" This all-weather Adirondack features a reclined, wide-slatted seat and backrest you'll be happy to sink into after a long day. Turn your patio into a refined retreat for the family by gathering a few of these chairs around a coordinating fire pit table where everyone can relax and reconnect.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
